message:
fix(agent): continue instead of break on abort during tool execution

When the abort signal fires during the tool result collection loop in
execute_tool_calls(), change from `break` to `continue`. The previous
`break` would exit the loop immediately when abort was detected after
processing a tool result, skipping any remaining tool results that had
already completed execution (since all tools run in parallel via
join_all before the sequential result processing loop).

With `continue`, all completed tool results are still collected and
pushed into the results vector, even after abort is signaled. The
steering check that follows each result already handles the abort case
by marking remaining tools as skipped with placeholder results. This
ensures consistent result vector lengths and prevents index mismatches
downstream when the agent loop processes the tool results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
